question: The scope reduction test returned 0/20 passing samples (pre-committed 'pipeline fundamentally broken' outcome), but real samples from the same cluster also fail 0/20 on the same criteria. Given this ambiguous result and 7 failed continuous latent diffusion versions, what is the correct next step?

project_state.status_snapshot: Phase 4.8. Scope reduction test completed but is INVALID. Generated samples scored 0/20 on automated criteria, but real training samples from the same cluster ALSO scored 0/20. The criteria (contiguous planar surfaces of 4+ blocks, ground contact ratio > 50%, largest connected component > 70%) were never validated against actual structures. The occupancy-based clustering (density, height, footprint) did not produce visually homogeneous clusters.

prior_decisions.title: v7 approach
prior_decisions.outcome: MSE-only + rotation aug + self-cond. VQ-VAE diagnostic passed.

prior_decisions.title: Discrete pivot correction
prior_decisions.outcome: Fallback = full-voxel discrete, NOT FSQ tokens

prior_decisions.title: Scope reduction test
prior_decisions.outcome: 0/20 passing BUT criteria broken. Test invalid.

metrics.scope_reduction_result: 0/20 generated passing, 0/20 REAL samples passing — criteria are broken
metrics.cluster_quality: Occupancy-based clustering does NOT capture visual homogeneity

project_state.version_history: v1: mode collapse → v2: adversarial collapse → v3: empty → v4: incoherent → v5: degenerate → v6a: blobs → v7: blobs → scope-reduction test: INVALID (broken criteria)

confounds_discovered_later: Tag-based labels in the dataset are noisy — many structures tagged 'house' are not visually houses
Need to validate evaluation criteria against real positive controls BEFORE using them to judge generated data
Colab memory feasibility for full-voxel discrete diffusion (32K positions x 3,717 classes) is a practical blocker nobody had tested
good_references: Scope reduction test failure was methodological, not a pipeline verdict — cannot conclude pipeline is broken from an invalid test
Quantization bypass result (95.6%) rules out quantization as the problem
failed_approaches_to_avoid: Automated occupancy-based clustering as a proxy for visual homogeneity
Using evaluation criteria without first validating them against real positive samples
ground_truth.actual_decision: Manual curation of 50-100 houses by visual inspection + validate evaluation criteria against 20 real curated houses (must pass 15+/20). In parallel: Colab memory feasibility test for discrete diffusion.
ground_truth.actual_outcome: Led to tag-based filtering approach (Debate #7), then final clean test (Debate #8) with manually curated houses.
